post.content: It should also support multi-languages. e.g., a page for a \'tree\' has other language buttons, and when pressed, it would show the \'tree\' page in other languages.

Use n-ary tree to store the page ID (url) and store in graph DB, use the page id+language key as the key and store its content on the object db, like s3. On each node, there can be a set of lang Id + timestamp. For timstamp, it is used for detecting if or not the content is updated, or version control. For partitioning, it can be based on hash value of page id.

We have provided video and textual content on this topic for which we have provided the link below. We have done thorough research in creating this content by going through Uber engineering blogs and technical talks. We would appreciate your inputs on our attempt in designing a scalable ride-hailing platform like Uber.\nYoutube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NOHQ15lwHKY\nArticle: https://techtakshila.com/system-design-interview/chapter-3
how about using the Trie data structure ?
